scripts.assets:sync: npm run icons:sync && npm run components:assets:sync
scripts.preview:build: npm run icons:catalog && npx esbuild button-preview-entry.tsx --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --outfile=dist/button-preview.js && npm run assets:sync
scripts.explorer:build: npm run icons:catalog && npx esbuild component-explorer-entry.tsx --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --outfile=dist/component-explorer.js && npm run assets:sync
